title: Python Programming
description: Learn Python from scratch. One of the most readable and powerful languages — perfect for beginners.
longDescription: Python reads almost like English, which makes it the ideal first language. But don't be fooled — it's also used at Google, Netflix, and NASA. We start from zero and work up to building real scripts, working with data, and understanding the fundamentals every developer needs.

lessons.title: Introduction to Python
lessons.description: Set up Python, write your first script, and understand why Python is such a great language to learn.

lessons.title: Variables & Data Types
lessons.description: Integers, floats, strings, booleans — understand Python's data types and how to use variables.

lessons.title: Working with Strings
lessons.description: String methods, formatting, slicing, and f-strings. Text manipulation you'll use every day.

lessons.title: Conditionals & Loops
lessons.description: Write if/elif/else statements and loop through data with for and while loops.

lessons.title: Functions
lessons.description: Define reusable functions, pass arguments, return values, and understand scope.

lessons.title: Lists & Tuples
lessons.description: Store collections of data. Slice, sort, iterate, and use list comprehensions.

lessons.title: Dictionaries & Sets
lessons.description: Key-value data with dictionaries and unique collections with sets.

lessons.title: File Handling
lessons.description: Read and write text files, work with CSV data, and handle exceptions.

lessons.title: Object-Oriented Python
lessons.description: Classes, objects, methods, inheritance — understand the object-oriented paradigm.

lessons.title: Modules & Libraries
lessons.description: Use Python's standard library and install packages with pip.

lessons.title: Project: Number Guessing Game
lessons.description: Build a complete number guessing game from scratch. Apply everything you've learned.
